blended.narrative: Nub's Nob is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,784 ft. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
